collection.clue.coin_25cent_1792: Often turns up in desert pyramids and buried coin ruins.
collection.clue.coin_nickel_1792: Desert wells and smaller desert digs favor this mint.
collection.clue.coin_1cent_1789: Trail ruins and desert excavations both hide older pennies.
collection.clue.flint_arrowhead: Common in trail ruins and the shallow layers of badlands digs.
collection.clue.obsidian_arrowhead: Look for rarer trail-ruin finds and the deepest badlands caches.
collection.clue.bone_arrowhead: Badlands dig sites and common ruin layers preserve worked bone.
collection.clue.scarab_pendant: Warm ocean ruins and sun-baked desert caches hide these charms.
collection.clue.turquoise_ring: Search shoreline caches and desert pyramids for polished jewelry.
collection.clue.silver_locket: Cold ocean ruins and stranded shoreline relics are your best lead.

collection.journal.tooltip.map: Sneak-use to receive a clue map.
collection.journal.map_missing: No matching clue site for %s could be found nearby.
collection.journal.map_complete: All collection sets are already complete.
